license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.jc2ciye
title: Seedling vigor
author: Zhenbin Hu

steps_raw.instruction: Go through the field and identify five plots to use as standards that represent scores ranging from 1 to 5
Go through the field to do seedling vigor phenotyping by compare the seedling with the standard plot
Assign a score between 1 and 5 to each plot using the scale developed from standard plots
